next_steps: Perform endoscopic guided biopsy of the nasopharyngeal mass and parapharyngeal soft tissue
Obtain CT scan of the chest to screen for pulmonary nodules or airway involvement
Perform a urinalysis with microscopy to check for hematuria or casts
Consult rheumatology for coordination of potential immunosuppressive therapy
Perform a lumbar puncture if neurological symptoms progress to evaluate for CNS vasculitis or meningitis
